calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-30-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
Raymond Burke, Esq. for Plaintiff: A-One Rent-A-Car.
Plaintiff's witness: Michael Walden, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Brandon Ross Pratt-Schlapkolh as follows:
Damages $10,367.20
Costs $59.00, for a total of $10,426.20
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

Judgment received in court at 2:00 p.m. and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
